en: I don't know, but the image is, it conjures up...
ja: わからないけど、浮かんでくるイメージは
zhTW: 我不知道，但浮現的畫面是
vi: Toi khong biet nhung hinh anh hien len la

en: It must be some sort of toad in the hole, mustn't it?

en: Yeah. It's getting worse. It must be. This, this is, I mean, really, I mean, I don't think anybody...

zhTW: 對，越來越糟了。一定是這個。我是說真的
vi: U, cang luc cang te. Chac la cai nay. Y toi la that su

en: It's a very specific relative, isn't it? Yeah, the father-in-law.
And I don't think anyone wants this German-type sexual harassment.
ko: 이런 독일식 성희롱을 원하지 않는 것 같아
ja: このドイツ式のセクハラを望んでいない

ja: 誰もそう思ってないと思う。わかるだろう？そして誰も
zhTW: 我覺得沒有人會那樣想。你知道的，我也不覺得有人
vi: Toi khong nghi ai nghi vay. Ban biet day, va toi khong nghi ai

en: But I don't think it can go wrong with a nice plate of...
ko: 하지만 손으로 찢은 고기 한 접시는 나쁘지 않을 것 같아
ja: でも手でほぐした肉の盛り合わせなら間違いないと思う
zhTW: 但我覺得一盤手撕肉不會錯
vi: Nhung toi nghi mot dia thit xe tay thi khong sai dau

ko: 아, 세상에. 모두의 최애, 더 먹고 싶어?

ja: みんなの大好物、もう少しいかが？
zhTW: 大家的最愛，要再來一些嗎？
vi: Mon yeu thich cua moi nguoi, ban co muon them khong?
